name: OPAL Fuels Inc. Class A Common Stock
summary: OPAL Fuels Inc. focuses on producing and distributing renewable natural gas (RNG), a low-carbon fuel alternative to traditional fossil fuels, derived from biogas captured from landfills, dairy farms, and other waste sources. The company develops, constructs, and operates RNG production facilities and sells RNG to transportation and industrial customers. Its headquarters are in White Plains, New York.
